_meta.purpose: Macro-corridor paths that don't terminate at a single event (e.g. continental sweeps, sea-level corridors). Most point-to-point dispersal arcs are derived from `origin_id` on each event in events.json — see scripts/add-origins.mjs. Phase 4/5 may add curated corridor paths here (Bab-el-Mandeb → Sundaland coastline, Bering land-bridge corridor, etc.).

schema.label: human-readable
schema.start_kya: older bound — when the path begins drawing
schema.end_kya: younger bound — when the path is fully drawn
schema.kind: early-dispersal | main-dispersal | coastal | sea-crossing | americas | polynesian | later-settlement
